title: RML Hospital Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: RML Hospital Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
